reviews.comment:
La mejor atención de los playeros. El Full impecable. Lo mismo que el local de ventas, siempre con una solución. Para volver siempre

The service from the gas station attendants was excellent. The Full service was spotless. The same goes for the sales office; they always have a solution. I'll definitely be back.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion del personal Taller Aca Palermo bien organizados Full Ypf renovado, muy buen ambiente Ademas opcion saludable: venden manzanas y bananas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff at Taller Aca Palermo. Well-organized, fully renovated YPF gas station, great atmosphere. Plus, a healthy option: they sell apples and bananas.

reviews.comment:
Es un club de automovilistas. Si estas asociado tenes descuento en combustibles, tiene sus propios talleres, servicio de remolque (mucho mas eficaz que el de muchos seguros, aunque ahora algunos seguros subcontratan las gruas del aca, servicio de gomería y mecánico que te resuelven en el momento (sin cargo) problemas menores.

(Translated by Google)
It's a motorists' club. If you're a member, you get a discount on fuel, it has its own workshops, a towing service (much more efficient than many insurance companies, although some now subcontract the tow trucks from the club), a tire repair service, and a mechanic who will fix minor problems on the spot (free of charge).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdV9MTXl3RRAB
